<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpClient\Internal; use Symfony\Component\HttpClient\Response\CurlResponse; /** * A pushed response with its request headers. * * @author Alexander M. Turek <me@derrabus.de> * * @internal */ final class PushedResponse { public function __construct( public CurlResponse $response, public array $requestHeaders, public array $parentOptions, public \CurlHandle $handle, ) { } }
